    "Brake rotor thickness is below the manufacturer's specified minimum limit (discard thickness)."
  ],

    "Stop work and reject the current assembly.",
    "Replace the worn brake rotor with a new unit meeting OEM thickness specifications before final assembly and road testing."

  "rationale": "The brake rotor's measured thickness is below the OEM minimum allowable limit. Reassembling the braking system with an under-spec rotor poses a critical safety risk, including reduced heat dissipation, increased risk of brake fade, and potential structural failure of the rotor under heavy braking.",
